atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for approximately three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the pain to basement renovation work.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with reaching and lifting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with overhead reaching.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes two extra-strength Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes two extra-strength Tylenol every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some relief from the Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports not complete resolution of pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in his arms or hands.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior shoulder pain episodes easily managed with Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports pain with active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician notes tenderness to the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects rotator cuff pathology.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Tylenol as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a steroid injection if symptoms do not improve after six to eight weeks of physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up visit in four weeks to assess progress.
